## Summary

Describe the change clearly and concisely.

## Why

Explain the problem this solves or the reason for the change.

## Scope

- [ ] Backend API
- [ ] Setup / install flow
- [ ] Config / schema
- [ ] Service orchestration
- [ ] Embedded UI / proxying
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other

## Testing

Describe what you tested and how.

- [ ] Not run (explain below)
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Automated tests updated or added

## Related Issues

Link related issues, discussions, or follow-up work.

## Checklist

- [ ] PR targets `dev` (unless this is release automation or an exceptional maintainer change)
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] Changes are focused and scoped to one logical change
- [ ] Documentation was updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Sensitive values, secrets, and local-only artifacts were not committed

## Notes

Add rollout notes, migration concerns, screenshots, or anything reviewers should know.
